title: Fix /adv-triage GraphQL budget exhaustion during Project field updates

tasks.title: Update Phase 3b in adv-triage.md: replace `gh project item-edit` on line 217 with `gh api graphql --include` single-field mutation for Value writes. Add budget gate before Value writes.

Update Phase 4 in adv-triage.md: add cached project-state protocol (reuse Phase 1 item-list), batched GraphQL mutation instructions (4 fields per item via `gh api graphql --include`), GraphQL budget estimation gate, 1-second pacing, idempotent resume logic (skip already-correct fields, ±0.05 WSJF tolerance), and rate-limit error handling. Replace line 254 `gh project item-edit` reference.
Update Phase 5 in adv-triage.md: add explicit note that Phase 5 must use a separate fresh `item-list` read (not Phase 4 cache) for ROADMAP freshness.
Update Phase 6 report template in adv-triage.md: add API Budget section (GraphQL points consumed, remaining, reset, batch mutations issued, items skipped).
Update Key Tools table in adv-triage.md: replace `gh project item-edit` row with batched `gh api graphql --include` rows (single-field, batch-4, budget check, per-response header check).
Update Anti-Patterns table in adv-triage.md: add 3 new rows (don't use item-edit for bulk writes, don't ignore rate-limit headers, don't use rateLimit query for every post-mutation check).
Add GitHub GraphQL Budget section to SETUP.md: REST vs GraphQL budget separation table, Projects v2 budget note, batching explanation, multi-session shared-budget note.
Validate: run `pnpm run check` to verify no manifest drift from command edits. Read the updated command contract end-to-end to verify consistency across all phases, Key Tools, and Anti-Patterns.
tasks.verification: Validation passed. typecheck ✓, lint ✓, format warning on unrelated pre-existing file. All item-edit references replaced except Anti-Patterns bad column. Fresh read, budget gate, batching, --include, resume, API Budget report all present and consistent.
tasks.summary: Validation passed. typecheck ✓, lint ✓, format warning on unrelated pre-existing file. All item-edit references replaced except Anti-Patterns bad column. Fresh read, budget gate, batching, --include, resume, API Budget report all present and consistent.
tasks.implementation_summary: Validation passed. typecheck ✓, lint ✓, format warning on unrelated pre-existing file. All item-edit references replaced except Anti-Patterns bad column. Fresh read, budget gate, batching, --include, resume, API Budget report all present and consistent.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal in prior session via Tier A inline approval. Proposal gate completion was interrupted by session health issue.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery gate complete. Agreement approved by user via Tier A inline approval. All 8 protocol steps executed. 0 CRITICAL findings, 0 HIGH findings. Key discovery: direct GraphQL batched mutations reduce API budget consumption 4× vs gh project item-edit.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated by independent adv-researcher: VALIDATED with 3 suggestions (all incorporated: --include flag, combined rateLimit query, header-absent fallback) and 1 question addressed (timeout retry re-checks budget gate). No CONFLICT.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved task graph via Tier A inline approval. 8 tasks: 7 implementation + 1 validation.

execution.approval_evidence: All 8 tasks completed. adv-triage.md updated: Phase 3b (single-field graphql), Phase 4 (cached reads, batched mutations, budget gate, pacing, resume), Phase 5 (fresh read), Phase 6 (API Budget report), Key Tools (4 graphql rows), Anti-Patterns (3 new rows). SETUP.md: GraphQL Budget section added. Validation: check passed (pre-existing format warning on unrelated file only).

acceptance.approval_evidence: All 12 AC verified against updated command contract. AC9 (resume without rate-limit) requires live validation after GraphQL reset (~19:43Z). No must-not rule violations. No spec conflicts.

release.approval_evidence: Validation: 0 errors, 11 expected warnings. No spec deltas (utility command, no formal spec). All 8 tasks done. Sign-off by user.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal has no Success Criteria section. How will we know this change is done?
Proposal has no Scope section. What files and modules will be affected?
Proposal references authentication/authorization without specifying the model. What auth mechanism will be used?
